input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.5.5.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.5.5.3
            TITLE: the ses will reduce any referenced or tested adhesive values by 50%

            CONTENT:
            rule F.5.5.3: The SES will reduce any referenced or tested adhesive values by 50%
F.5.5.3 The SES will reduce any referenced or tested adhesive values by 50%

final_answer: The SES will reduce any referenced or tested adhesive values by 50%
